{{Infobox event
| name = Striker Trial
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Striker Trial]] is an open field of scorched, blasted soil.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c15">''Blackflame'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] could not destroy the targets in the [[Striker Trial]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16">''Blackflame'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Striker Trial]] involves targets and spears.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c16" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Striker Trial]] took ten days to pass.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17">''Blackflame'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle events]]
